name: log-viewer
description: Tail and filter log files on the server in real time — follow, grep, highlight levels.

configSchema.label: Allowed Directories
configSchema.description: Comma-separated root directories that can be browsed for log files. All tailed paths must live under one of these roots. Defaults to your home directory; add /var/log, /tmp, or specific service log paths as needed.

configSchema.label: Log File Extensions
configSchema.description: Comma-separated file extensions to list. Empty shows every file.

configSchema.label: Initial Backlog (KB)
configSchema.description: How many KB from the tail of the file to send before following. Large files with a huge backlog take longer to render.

configSchema.label: Show Hidden Files
configSchema.description: Show files and directories starting with . in the file list.
